title: colchicum neapolitanum var. castrense
intro: Colchicum neapolitanum var. castrense, also known as the Autumn Crocus, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Liliaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gout and other inflammatory conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Colchicum neapolitanum var. castrense include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving joint mobility. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by extracting the root or tuber, and are used in various forms, including tinctures, infusions, and ointments.
